ab: la’osayli ka tangoco, valakini nyane na thakongadavane.
ch: 我的好朋友叫tangoco，他也是thakongadavane的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is tangoco, and he is also an thakongadavane child.
We study together in the kongadavane tribe.

ab: ’atalese kiname ta’aese biciingi na maodrange timalolwai, sawkwa kiname igo’o thwakongadavadavane.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說多納語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the thakongadavane proficiently.

ab: ma’agae kake si lakamite kake, ki tangoco ka la’aticane si lakaylai.
ch: 我很高也很胖，tangoco很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while tangoco is short and thin.

ab: ki tangoco ka sapaovikane, madalame kita nyane.
ch: tangoco很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: tangoco is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
